---
pagetitle: "KDSC | Curriculum"
toc: false
listing:
  - id: module-listings
    contents: 
      - "./module/module_workshop/*.qmd"
      - "./module/module_lecture/*.qmd"
      - "./module/module_tutorial/*.qmd"
    template: curriculum_listing.ejs 
css: curriculum_style.css
---

## Data Science Competency {.main-header}

Our curriculum is organized around six core competencies. Each category contains modules designed to build specific, in-demand data science skills. Click on a card to learn more!

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {.grid .text-center}
::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
:::::: flip-card
::::: flip-card-inner
::: flip-card-front
<i class="bi bi-database-gear"></i>

<h4>Data Engineering</h4>
:::

::: flip-card-back
<h4>Data Engineering</h4>

<p>Build and maintain the scalable systems and pipelines that collect, store, and process large volumes of data.</p>
:::
:::::
::::::
:::::::

::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
:::::: flip-card
::::: flip-card-inner
::: flip-card-front
<i class="bi bi-tools"></i>

<h4>Data Wrangling</h4>
:::

::: flip-card-back
<h4>Data Wrangling</h4>

<p>Clean, transform, and map raw data into a structured format suitable for analysis and model building.</p>
:::
:::::
::::::
:::::::

::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
:::::: flip-card
::::: flip-card-inner
::: flip-card-front
<i class="bi bi-minecart-loaded"></i>

<h4>Data Mining</h4>
:::

::: flip-card-back
<h4>Data Mining</h4>

<p>Discover hidden patterns, valuable insights, and meaningful knowledge from large and complex datasets.</p>
:::
:::::
::::::
:::::::

::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
:::::: flip-card
::::: flip-card-inner
::: flip-card-front
<i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i>

<h4>Statistical Foundation</h4>
:::

::: flip-card-back
<h4>Statistical Foundation</h4>

<p>Apply statistical principles and hypothesis testing to analyze data, interpret results, and ensure valid conclusions.</p>
:::
:::::
::::::
:::::::

::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
:::::: flip-card
::::: flip-card-inner
::: flip-card-front
<i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i>

<h4>Programming Skills</h4>
:::

::: flip-card-back
<h4>Programming Skills</h4>

<p>Use coding languages like Python and R to implement algorithms, automate tasks, and create data-driven applications.</p>
:::
:::::
::::::
:::::::

::::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
:::::: flip-card
::::: flip-card-inner
::: flip-card-front
<i class="bi bi-bricks"></i>

<h4>Model Building</h4>
:::

::: flip-card-back
<h4>Model Building</h4>

<p>Create, train, and refine predictive models to forecast future trends and make data-informed decisions.</p>
:::
:::::
::::::
:::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

## Explore Our Modules {.main-header}

This page features a comprehensive collection of modules curated by our partners at KDSC. These resources include lecture slides, interactive tutorial content, and hands-on workshop materials, designed to enhance your learning and expertise in data science competency.

```{=html}

<div class="filter-container">
    <div class="filter-grid">
        <div class="filter-box">
            <label for="filterCompetency" class="form-label fw-bold">By Competency</label>
            <select id="filterCompetency" class="form-select">
                <option value="all" selected>All Competencies</option>
            </select>
        </div>
        <div class="filter-box">
            <label for="filterSource" class="form-label fw-bold">By Source</label>
            <select id="filterSource" class="form-select">
                <option value="all" selected>All Sources</option>
            </select>
        </div>
        <div class="filter-box">
            <label for="filterLang" class="form-label fw-bold">By Tech/Language</label>
            <select id="filterLang" class="form-select">
                <option value="all" selected>All Technologies</option>
            </select>
        </div>
        <div class="filter-box">
            <label for="searchFilter" class="form-label fw-bold">By Keyword</label>
            <input type="text" id="searchFilter" class="form-control" placeholder="Type to search...">
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

<br>

::: {#module-listings}
:::

```{=html}
<div id="no-results-message" style="display: none; text-align: center; padding: 2rem; font-size: 1.2em;">
    <p>No curriculum items match the selected filters. Please try a different combination.</p>
</div>
<div id="pagination-container" class="pagination-container"></div>
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // --- Logic for the Flip Cards (No Changes) ---
  const flipCards = document.querySelectorAll('.flip-card');
  flipCards.forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('click', function() {
      card.querySelector('.flip-card-inner').classList.toggle('is-flipped');
    });
  });

  // A short delay to ensure Quarto's listing renders first
  setTimeout(initializeFiltersAndPagination, 100);
});

function initializeFiltersAndPagination() {
    // --- 1. DEFINE ALL ELEMENTS AND STATE VARIABLES ONCE ---
    const competencyFilter = document.getElementById('filterCompetency');
    const sourceFilter = document.getElementById('filterSource');
    const langFilter = document.getElementById('filterLang');
    const searchFilter = document.getElementById('searchFilter');
    const itemList = document.querySelector('#listing-module-listings .item-list');
    const noResultsMessage = document.getElementById('no-results-message');
    const paginationContainer = document.getElementById('pagination-container');

    if (!itemList) { return; }
    
    // This is the full, unfiltered list of all cards. We define it only ONCE.
    const allCards = Array.from(itemList.querySelectorAll('.item-card'));
    // This tracks the current page. We define it only ONCE.
    let currentPage = 1;
    const itemsPerPage = 9;

    // --- 2. HELPER FUNCTIONS (NOW NESTED FOR CLEANER SCOPE) ---

    function displayPage(items, page) {
        itemList.innerHTML = ''; // Clear the list
        page--; // Adjust for zero-based index

        const startIndex = itemsPerPage * page;
        const endIndex = startIndex + itemsPerPage;
        const paginatedItems = items.slice(startIndex, endIndex);

        for (const item of paginatedItems) {
            itemList.appendChild(item);
        }
    }

    function setupPagination(items) {
        paginationContainer.innerHTML = ''; // Clear old buttons
        const pageCount = Math.ceil(items.length / itemsPerPage);
        
        // Don't show page buttons if there's only one page
        if (pageCount <= 1) return;
        
        for (let i = 1; i <= pageCount; i++) {
            const btn = document.createElement('button');
            btn.innerText = i;
            btn.classList.add('page-btn');
            if (i === currentPage) {
                btn.classList.add('active');
            }
            btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                // Update the shared currentPage variable
                currentPage = i;
                displayPage(items, currentPage);
                
                let currentActive = document.querySelector('.pagination-container .active');
                if (currentActive) currentActive.classList.remove('active');
                btn.classList.add('active');
            });
            paginationContainer.appendChild(btn);
        }
    }

    function applyFilters() {
        const selectedCompetency = competencyFilter.value;
        const selectedSource = sourceFilter.value;
        const selectedLang = langFilter.value;
        const searchTerm = searchFilter.value.toLowerCase().trim();

        // **FIX:** Filter the original 'allCards' array, not the currently visible ones
        const filteredCards = allCards.filter(card => {
            const competency = card.dataset.competency || '';
            const source = card.dataset.source || '';
            const lang = card.dataset.lang || '';
            const cardText = card.textContent.toLowerCase();

            const competencyMatch = selectedCompetency === 'all' || competency.includes(selectedCompetency);
            const sourceMatch = selectedSource === 'all' || source.includes(selectedSource);
            const langMatch = selectedLang === 'all' || lang.includes(selectedLang);
            const searchMatch = searchTerm === '' || cardText.includes(searchTerm);

            return competencyMatch && sourceMatch && langMatch && searchMatch;
        });
        
        // **FIX:** When filtering, always reset to page 1
        currentPage = 1;
        displayPage(filteredCards, currentPage);
        setupPagination(filteredCards);
        
        const hasResults = filteredCards.length > 0;
        itemList.style.display = hasResults ? 'grid' : 'none';
        paginationContainer.style.display = hasResults ? 'flex' : 'none';
        noResultsMessage.style.display = hasResults ? 'none' : 'block';
    }

    function populateFilters() {
        const competencies = new Set();
        const sources = new Set();
        const langs = new Set();

        allCards.forEach(card => {
            (card.dataset.competency || '').split(',').forEach(c => c.trim() && competencies.add(c.trim()));
            (card.dataset.source || '').split(',').forEach(f => f.trim() && sources.add(f.trim()));
            (card.dataset.lang || '').split(',').forEach(l => l.trim() && langs.add(l.trim()));
        });

        const addOptions = (selectElement, optionsSet) => {
            const sortedOptions = Array.from(optionsSet).sort();
            sortedOptions.forEach(option => {
                const newOption = document.createElement('option');
                newOption.value = option;
                newOption.textContent = option;
                selectElement.appendChild(newOption);
            });
        };

        addOptions(competencyFilter, competencies);
        addOptions(sourceFilter, sources);
        addOptions(langFilter, langs);
    }
    
    // --- 3. INITIALIZATION ---
    populateFilters();
    applyFilters();

    competencyFilter.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
    sourceFilter.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
    langFilter.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
    searchFilter.addEventListener('input', applyFilters);
}
</script>
```
